title: Berserker (More RPG Classes)

# 🪓Enter a wild, relentless battle trance as a Berserker!
---

---
## 🕹️ Features
### ✨Spells
Make use of the new Berserker-Skills to make fighting and combat more fun.
By equipping a Spell Book with a bound Spell-Pool or using Weapons with a bound Spell, you can cast the spells.
To craft a Spell Book, search for a Spell Binding Table or craft a table! You'll need a book
![Spell Pool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8hqOZzxM/images/c3b8e7a7d81f8d557e05cd621b339d9a58c90624.png)
### 🤺Combat & Equipment
- Craft new Berserker axe-weapons and Armor, you can also find them in chests as loot!
- You should use Better Combat for the best experience!
- The Berserker is all about high physical melee damage
- The class profits through the equipment from the "Rage" Attribute, the less health you have the more damage you deal!
- Some Weapons cant be crafted, you can only find them as loot in chests
![Berserker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8hqOZzxM/images/1637210c0e35e0c19da58b91850a377237d9a707.png)

## ⚙️Configuration
<details>
<summary>File Locations</summary>
  
- Armor & Weapon bonuses:
- _config/berserker_rpg/items.json_
- Loot Injections:
- config/rpg_series/loot.json
- Status Effects:
- config/berserker_rpg/effects.json
</details>
